commit.message:
Initial release: China job site scraping guide with battle-tested scripts

Comprehensive guide documenting 7 major technical challenges encountered
while scraping Chinese job platforms (Boss直聘, 飞书招聘, 字节跳动, 腾讯 etc.)
and their solutions after 8 rounds of iteration.

Includes:
- SPA rendering with Playwright
- Anti-bot bypass via CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol)
- AppleScript fallback for zero-detection scraping (macOS)
- Feishu recruitment portal specialized extractor
- LLM agent hallucination prevention patterns
- Multi-selector DOM extraction with fallbacks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: align with live DIGIT stack — root tenant users, query string forwarding, route ports

Fixes discovered by running 24-point live integration verification against the
real DIGIT Docker Compose stack:

- Use ADMIN/EMPLOYEE for system login (not INTERNAL_MICROSERVICE_ROLE)
- Generate DIGIT-compliant passwords (8-15 chars, uppercase+lowercase+digit+special)
- Search users by userName (not emailId) since DIGIT encrypts all PII
- Normalize city tenants to root tenant for user search/create (DIGIT stores
  users at state level, e.g. "pg" not "pg.citya")
- Forward query string params through proxy (fixes workflow search)
- Use correct PGR endpoint path (/v2/request/_search)
- Align all route ports with Kong kong.yml configuration
- Add live integration verification script (tests/integration/verify-live.ts)

24/24 live tests pass, 31/31 mock tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lift shared Pipedrive data to App.jsx with address enrichment and calendar/map improvements

- Move usePipedriveData to App.jsx as single source of truth, eliminating duplicate API calls

- InspectionDashboard receives pre-enriched data, enriches inspector activities for calendar/map
- Calendar blocks now show property addresses instead of activity type names

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix CI signing: create dev cert via ASC API + temp keychain

Self-hosted runner has locked login keychain, so Xcode can't create certs
via -allowProvisioningUpdates. New approach:
1. Revoke all existing orphaned dev certs via ASC API
2. Generate CSR + private key locally
3. Submit CSR to ASC API to create fresh dev cert
4. Import cert+key into unlocked temp keychain
5. Clean up temp keychain after build

Same proven approach used by the Snow/PowderChaser project.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: distinguish 'not configured' vs 'configured but not loaded' in /setup check

Playwright and Stitch MCP can be correctly configured but not loaded in
the current session (npx startup failure, etc). The setup check now shows
three states instead of binary ready/not-ready:
- ✅ Ready (tools available)
- ⚠️ Configured but not loaded (restart needed)
- ❌ Not configured (needs installation)

This prevents misleading users into re-installing already-working tools.

commit.message:
Add confidence recalibration to correct overconfident engines

Calibration table shows massive overconfidence: 85-100 bucket expects
99% WR but gets 50% (0.49 cal error). Gemini STST claims ~60% confidence
but only hits 14%.

New recalibration step in compute_weighted_picks() scales each engine's
pick confidence by actual_hit_rate / (avg_confidence / 100), clamped to
[0.3, 1.5]. This means Gemini STST's 60-confidence picks become ~18
after scaling (0.14/0.60 = 0.23, clamped to 0.3).

Only applies to engines with >= 10 resolved picks (configurable).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: browserforge consistent browser fingerprint + unified UA across all fetchers

Add get_stealth_headers() in config.py — uses browserforge to generate a
complete, internally consistent set of browser headers (UA + sec-ch-ua +
Accept + Sec-Fetch, 11 headers total) cached per session. Chrome version
pinned to match BROWSER_USER_AGENT env var for exact sec-ch-ua consistency.

Fix scattered UA inconsistencies:
- jina.py: "feedgrab/0.1" → get_user_agent() (was exposing tool identity)
- twitter_fxtwitter.py: "Mozilla/5.0" → get_user_agent()
- twitter.py (syndication): "Mozilla/5.0" → get_user_agent()
- wechat_search.py: 3 hardcoded headers → get_stealth_headers() full set

Graceful degradation with install guidance when browserforge is not installed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Use fresh async engine per Celery task to avoid event loop conflicts

asyncio.run() creates a new event loop, but the module-level SQLAlchemy
async engine gets bound to the first loop. Subsequent Celery tasks fail
with "Future attached to a different loop". Added make_session_factory()
that creates a fresh engine per call, used by all Celery tasks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: C++ example compilation and BDD test infrastructure

- Fix CommandRouter API signature mismatch by adding pointer overloads
  to from_event_book() in PlayerState, TableState, HandState
- Fix UUID access using .value() in rejected_handler.cpp
- Fix proto type mismatches (TEXAS_HOLDEM not NLHE, set_small_blind not
  mutable_small_blind, CardsDealt not HandDealt)
- Fix gtest include order (must precede cucumber-cpp autodetect.hpp)
- Create all_steps.cpp to compile step definitions in single translation
  unit, avoiding __COUNTER__ macro collisions
- Add cucumber-cpp BDD test infrastructure with wire protocol support
- Update container images with required Boost and Ruby dependencies
- Document C++ as best-effort due to cucumber-cpp/cucumber-wire
  ecosystem incompatibilities with modern Ruby

The C++ code compiles successfully but end-to-end Gherkin test execution
is blocked by cucumber-wire gem incompatibilities with cucumber-ruby 3.x+.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
feat: split reader interface, add NetBird AES-GCM email decryption

- Split reader.go into reader.go (interfaces only), postgres_reader.go,
  and sqlite_reader.go for clean separation of concerns
- Rename NewEventReader → NewPostgresEventReader for consistency
- Add NetbirdDecryptor (AES-256-GCM) to decrypt email/name fields that
  NetBird encrypts at rest in its PostgreSQL and SQLite stores
- Support two key-resolution options:
    Option A: netbird_encryption_key (base64 key in eventsproc config)
    Option B: netbird_config_path (path to NetBird's config.yaml — reads
              server.store.encryptionKey; takes priority over Option A)
- Default email enrichment to disabled/none (NetBird encrypts the users
  table; joins yield ciphertext without the decryption key)
- Add volume mount in lab docker-compose for NetBird config.yaml with
  industry best-practice comment on secret sharing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(sensei): refine capability boundaries across Template Library, Playbook Engine, Task Engine, and PRODUCT.md

- Template Library: remove Talking Points; expand Priority Event Mapping with per-event Trigger Date column; remove duplicate Objective Configurations reference
- Playbook Engine: N-stage Objective Chain; add Relationship to Template Library section; add 3-level queue structure (Priority → Event → Urgency Score); remove duplicate content now owned by Template Library
- Task Engine: remove event_rule source (all events via Playbook Engine); add Task Creation Paths and Task Completion Path diagrams; add Contact Compliance gate; fix action_type to reference Template Library; add Required Field Validation feature
- PRODUCT.md: add Stage column to Capability Registry; reorder by operational stage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: security hardening — sessionId revocation, WS disconnect, rate-limit, audit log, Slack retry, tests

- JwtAuthenticationFilter: validate sessionId claim against Redis on every request
- RefreshTokenStore: add saveSession/getSession/deleteSession (key: session:{email})
- AuthService: generate + store sessionId on login/signup/refresh; force WS close on new login
- WebSocketSessionRegistry: send /user/queue/session-expired on new login
- SlackAlertService: queue-based retry with exponential backoff (max 3 attempts)
- ErrorCode: add SESSION_REVOKED (AUTH010)

feat: replace Twelve Labs with Gemini video analysis via GCS URI

- New videoScanService.js: analyzes video via Gemini using gs:// URI
  directly (no indexing, no polling, ~20x cheaper than Twelve Labs)
- Rewritten video12labs.js: single POST /upload endpoint that uploads
  to GCS, analyzes via Gemini, extracts thumbnails, returns everything
- Simplified VideoInventoryScan.vue: removed polling loop, session
  management, elapsed timer. Single request replaces 3-step flow.
- Tiered models: basic=gemini-2.5-flash, pro=gemini-2.5-pro

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix path_string regression and function_base_clip_readded test

Two fixes:
1. ng_syncVarToTextFields: skip toString conversion for Object/Array/Function
   values to avoid observable side effects (custom toString tracing). Only
   convert primitive types (string, number, boolean, null, movieclip).

2. Dead base_clip re-resolution: when a closure's base_clip MC is removed
   (negative depth), re-resolve via original_target path to find a live MC
   at the same path. Implemented via reResolveDeadBaseClip() helper used
   at all base_clip context switch sites in actionCallFunction/actionCallMethod.

commit.message:
Fix CI signing: purge revoked certs from runner keychain before archive

The ASC API cert cleanup revokes excess dev certs, but they remain in the
self-hosted runner's persistent keychain. Xcode finds and rejects them with
"Signing certificate is invalid". New step deletes all "Created via API"
certs from keychains so only the fresh auto-provisioned cert is used.

commit.message:
fix: IA coleta TODOS os campos da ficha trabalhista antes de enviar formulário

Problemas corrigidos:
- IA fazia poucas perguntas e enviava o link do formulário cedo demais
- IA não sabia quais campos já estavam preenchidos na ficha
- Não havia roteiro de perguntas para guiar a coleta de dados

Mudanças:
1. Busca ficha trabalhista do banco e injeta status (campos preenchidos
   vs faltando) no prompt como {{ficha_status}}
2. Roteiro completo de 8 fases com perguntas específicas para cada campo:
   Identificação → Dados Pessoais → Localização → Contrato → Jornada →
   FGTS/Verbas → Testemunhas → Resumo
3. Condição explícita para next_step="formulario": só após ter nome,
   empregador, função, admissão, situação, salário, horários, FGTS,
   horas extras e testemunhas
4. Formulário serve para REVISÃO/ASSINATURA, não preenchimento
5. IA pula automaticamente campos que já estão preenchidos

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Resolve landing page broken colors and missing hero image

- tailwind.config.js: CSS variables are oklch() full values, so remove
  the hsl() wrapper from every color reference. hsl(oklch(...)) is
  invalid CSS and silently strips all colour from the page.
- next.config.js: Switch from deprecated `domains` to `remotePatterns`
  and add the *.public.blob.vercel-storage.com wildcard so the hero
  image loaded from Vercel Blob storage is allowed by Next.js Image
  Optimization instead of being blocked.
